data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that weather conditions (temperature, precipitation, wind) are auto-captured. While the linked use case mentions that weather was 'auto-logged: 68°F, clear', it does not provide sufficient detail to confirm that all required weather conditions are captured, particularly precipitation and wind. This indicates a gap in the implementation as the requirement is not fully covered.
gaps: Insufficient evidence that all required weather conditions (precipitation and wind) are auto-captured.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add detailed weather condition logging
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API captures temperature, precipitation, and wind conditions.
